name: huntflow-api-client
documentation:
[![](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/huntflow-api-client.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/huntflow-api-client/)
[![Code style: black](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-000000.svg)](https://github.com/psf/black)
[![Imports: isort](https://img.shields.io/badge/%20imports-isort-%231674b1?style=flat&labelColor=ef8336)](https://pycqa.github.io/isort/)

# huntflow-api-client
Huntflow API Client for Python


## Installation
Install using `pip install huntflow-api-client`

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.locker.AbstractLocker.acquire
documentation:
Non-blocking lock aqcuire.
If there is the lock already, then return False.
If the lock is not acquired, then acquire the lock and return True

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.locker.AbstractLocker.wait_for_lock
documentation:
Blocking lock check. If there is no locks, then return.
If the lock is set, then wait for it's release.

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.locker.AsyncioLockLocker

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.locker.AsyncioLockLocker.acquire
documentation:
Non-blocking lock aqcuire.
If there is the lock already, then return False.
If the lock is not acquired, then acquire the lock and return True

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.locker.AsyncioLockLocker.wait_for_lock
documentation:
Blocking lock check. If there is no locks, then return.
If the lock is set, then wait for it's release.

Simple implementation of locker interface.
It may be used if you need to synchronize token refresh across several
coroutines in a single thread.
Warning: Do not use it if you need to synchronize token updates via several threads
of processes.
In case of several processes you have to implement some distributed locking mechanism.
Which one to use depends of your infrastructure (redis, etcd, whatever).

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.get_auth_header
documentation: Returns auth headers for requests

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.get_refresh_data
documentation: Returns data to use in refresh token request

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.update
documentation: Save updated token to a persistent storage here if you need it

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.lock_for_update
documentation:
Non-blocking method to acquire lock before token refresh.
Returns True if lock has been acquired successfully,
False if the lock is already acquired.

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.release_lock
documentation: Release previously acquired lock

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.AbstractTokenProxy.is_updated
documentation:
Returns True if the token has been changed since last `get_auth_header` call.
Returns False otherwise.

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.DummyHuntflowTokenProxy
documentation:
Empty implementation of token proxy interface.
Does nothing for token saving.
It just implements necessary methods required for HF API client.
Use it if you don't need to save refreshed tokens
or don't need to refresh tokens at all.

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.HuntflowTokenProxy

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.HuntflowTokenProxy.lock_for_update
documentation:
Non-blocking method to acquire lock before token refresh.
Returns True if lock has been acquired successfully,
False if the lock is already acquired.

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.tokens.proxy.HuntflowTokenProxy.release_lock
documentation: Release previously acquired lock

Ready to use TokenProxy implementation.
It can read and update token via some implementation of
AbstractHuntflowTokenStorage interface (e.g. HuntflowTokenFileStorage).
Provide a lock object if you need to synchronize token updates across several
coroutines (see `LocalLocker`), threads or processes.
Also look at 'examples' directory for usage examples.

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.models.response.rejection_reason.RejectionReason
documentation: The ID can be None because the backend adds the rejection reason "Other" where ID is None

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.models.response.vacancies.VacancyChild
documentation: Child vacancy for multivacancy

classes.name: huntflow_api_client.models.request.vacancy_requests.CreateVacancyRequestRequest
documentation:
The model accepts additional fields,
    which need to be specified for specified account vacancy request.

Example:
    CreateVacancyRequestRequest(
        account_vacancy_request=1,
        position="my_position",
        my_field="my_value",
    )

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.entities.applicants.Applicant.search_by_cursor
documentation:
API method reference:

: <https://api.huntflow.ai/v2/docs#get-/accounts/-account_id-/applicants/search_by_cursor>

```
param account_id

Organization ID

param next_page_cursor

A cursor to the next page,
if specified, no other params will  be included

param query

Search query

param tag

List of tag ID

param status

List of vacancy status ID

param rejection_reason

List of rejection reason ID

param vacancy

List of vacancy ID's or None
- None - no filter for vacancies
- [] - empty list means applicant is not assigned to any vacancy
- [1, 2, 3] - applicants assigned to specified vacancies

param only_current_status

If the value is set to True,
then applicants who are currently at this status will be displayed.

param account_source

List of resume source ID

param field

Search field

param count

Number of items per page

return

Returns a list of found applicants and a cursor to the next page
```

methods.name: huntflow_api_client.api.HuntflowAPI.__init__
documentation:
API client.
\:param base_url: Base url for API (including schema),

> like '<https:/>/\<api domain>'

```
param token

Optional token structure with access token.
Use it if you don't care about token refreshing

param token_proxy

Alternative way (see  param) to provide token.
If you need to properly refresh tokens, then you should use this param
instead of . You can use 
or implement your own class for this,
the class must implement AbstractTokenProxy interface.
Also see usage example at .

param auto_refresh_tokens

If True then the client will handle token expiration.
"Handle" means: catch token expiration errors and run token refresh request.
```
